title: MinecraftAdditionsOddities
description: This mod is an addon of MinecraftAdditions wich add new armors,biomes and more cool Features.
body:
Welcome to MinecraftAdditionsOddities. REQUIRE MINECRAFT ADDITIONS.

This mod add Some uesefull things wich there isn't in Vanilla.

- New Custom Armors. 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43dd92fc3c5b28c1d511297e83f8fdd7cafc7c61_0.webp)

This mod Add 3 new custom armors: Copper,Emerald and Amethyst wich minecraft vanilla need.

</details>


- New Biomes


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9371582e1710495ad768b5e9fd14c6504a94c4aa_0.webp)

This mod add 2 new custom biomes with 1 unic wood set: Maple set can be found into the Maple Forest and the Autumnal oak tree can be found into the Autumnal Forest.
</details>


- New Element Tags


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Tags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc6cecd865e3c04a0bba110441cd0b51d63e87ad.png)

This mod add also a new element tag wich allow you to Create  a Beacon with copepr variant. ACTUALLY NON SUPPORTED THE WAXED COPPER VARIANTS.
</details>
